ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product sold */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., Consumable) */,
  "store_id" TEXT /* ID of the store where the sale was made */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the sale was made */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the sale was made */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product sold */,
  "total_sales_amount" REAL /* Total sales amount (quantity * unit price) */,
  "external_factors" TEXT /* External factors impacting the sale (e.g., economic crisis, festival) */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_product_name FOREIGN KEY ("product_name") REFERENCES products ("product_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the store */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the store is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the store is located */,
  "store_type" TEXT /* Type of the store (e.g., supermarket, convenience store) */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the store manager */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the store */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the store */,
  "total_square_footage" INTEGER /* Total square footage of the store */,
  "number_of_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees working in the store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., Consumable) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the product */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "supplier_id" TEXT /* ID of the supplier */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the product (e.g., kg, liters) */,
  "cost_price" REAL /* Cost price of the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for inventory management */,
  "shelf_life" INTEGER /* Shelf life of the product in days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_crises" (
  "crisis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic crisis */,
  "crisis_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic crisis */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the economic crisis */,
  "impact_on_sales" REAL /* Impact of the economic crisis on sales (as a percentage) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the economic crisis */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the economic crisis */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the economic crisis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crisis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_crises" (
  "crisis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health crisis */,
  "crisis_name" TEXT /* Name of the health crisis */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the health crisis */,
  "impact_on_sales" REAL /* Impact of the health crisis on sales (as a percentage) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the health crisis */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the health crisis */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the health crisis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crisis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "festivals" (
  "festival_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each festival */,
  "festival_name" TEXT /* Name of the festival */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the festival */,
  "impact_on_sales" REAL /* Impact of the festival on sales (as a percentage) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the festival */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the festival */,
  "celebration_type" TEXT /* Type of celebration (e.g., religious, cultural) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("festival_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* Name of the weather condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the weather condition */,
  "impact_on_sales" REAL /* Impact of the weather condition on sales (as a percentage) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the weather condition */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the weather condition */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Average temperature during the weather condition */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Amount of precipitation during the weather condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_density" (
  "density_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population density level */,
  "density_level" TEXT /* Level of population density */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the population density level */,
  "impact_on_sales" REAL /* Impact of population density on sales (as a percentage) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the population density measurement */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the population density measurement */,
  "population_count" INTEGER /* Actual population count */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("density_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_forecast" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales forecast */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "store_id" TEXT /* ID of the store */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the sales forecast */,
  "forecasted_sales" REAL /* Forecasted sales amount */,
  "forecast_method" TEXT /* Method used for forecasting (e.g., time series, machine learning) */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval of the forecast */,
  "accuracy_score" REAL /* Accuracy score of the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_forecast_product_name FOREIGN KEY ("product_name") REFERENCES products ("product_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_forecast_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the customer is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the customer is located */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of customer registration */,
  "total_purchases" INTEGER /* Total number of purchases made by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the supplier is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the supplier is located */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "total_products_supplied" INTEGER /* Total number of products supplied by the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)
